lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬੋਲਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਬੋਲਹ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਵਨ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bolaaveh tiau bolah suaamee kudarat kavan hamaaree |
lines.english: As You cause me to speak, so do I speak, O Lord Master. What other power do I have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਓ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥੮॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: saadhasang naanak jas gaaeo jo prabh kee at piaaree |8|1|8|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, sing His Praises; they are so very dear to God. ||8||1||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਨਾਸ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਸਫਲ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhai traas naas kripaal gun nidh safal suaamee sev |1|
lines.english: O Destroyer of fear and dread, Merciful Lord Master, Treasure of Excellence, fruitful is Your service. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਥ ਨਰਹਰ ਦੀਨ ਬੰਧਵ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: naath narahar deen bandhav patit paavan dev |
lines.english: O Lord, Man-lion Incarnate, Companion to the poor, Divine Purifier of sinners;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਦਇਆਲ ਕੇਸਵ ਤਾਰਿ ਜਗ ਭਵ ਸਿੰਧ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan saran deaal kesav taar jag bhav sindh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of Your Feet, O Merciful Lord. Carry me across the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: har gopaal gur gobind |
lines.english: O Lord, Cherisher of the World, Guru-Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਹਰਨ ਮਦ ਮੋਹ ਦਹਨ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ਮਨ ਮਕਰੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh haran mad moh dehan muraar man makarand |
lines.english: O Dispeller of sexual desire and anger, Eliminator of intoxication and attachment, Destroyer of ego, Honey of the mind;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਧਰਣੀਧਰ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੁ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam maran nivaar dharaneedhar pat raakh paramaanand |2|
lines.english: set me free from birth and death, O Sustainer of the earth, and preserve my honor, O Embodiment of supreme bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਤ ਅਨਿਕ ਤਰੰਗ ਮਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਿਦ ਮੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: jalat anik tarang maaeaa gur giaan har rid mant |
lines.english: The many waves of desire for Maya are burnt away, when the Guru's spiritual wisdom is enshrined in the heart, through the Guru's Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੇਦਿ ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਚਿੰਤ ਮੇਟਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਨੰਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chhed ahanbudh karunaa mai chint mett purakh anant |3|
lines.english: Destroy my egotism, O Merciful Lord; dispel my anxiety, O Infinite Primal Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਮਰਥ ਪਲ ਮਹੂਰਤ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: simar samarath pal mahoorat prabh dhiaan sehaj samaadh |
lines.english: Remember in meditation the Almighty Lord, every moment and every instant; meditate on God in the celestial peace of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਪੂਰਨ ਜਾਚੀਐ ਰਜ ਸਾਧ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: deen deaal prasan pooran jaacheeai raj saadh |4|
lines.english: O Merciful to the meek, perfectly blissful Lord, I beg for the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖੁ ਧਰਮ ਭਰਮ ਬਿਦਾਰਿ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਉਧਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: rakh dharam bharam bidaar man te udhar har nirankaar |5|
lines.english: Please, preserve my faith, dispel these doubts from my mind, and save me, O Formless Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਿਥਨ ਦੁਰੰਤ ਆਸਾ ਬਾਸਨਾ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: moh mithan durant aasaa baasanaa bikaar |
lines.english: Emotional attachment is false, desire is filthy, and longing is corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਢਿ ਆਢਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਧਿ ਹੋਤ ਜਿਨਾ ਨ ਚੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaadt aadt bhanddaar har nidh hot jinaa na cheer |
lines.english: They have become wealthy, loaded with the treasures of the Lord's riches; they were lacking even clothes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਲ ਮੁਗਧ ਮੂੜ ਕਟਾਖੵ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਭਏ ਗੁਣ ਮਤਿ ਧੀਰ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: khal mugadh moorr kattaakhay sreedhar bhe gun mat dheer |6|
lines.english: The idiotic, foolish and senseless people have become virtuous and patient, receiving the Gracious Glance of the Lord of wealth. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤ ਜਗਦੀਸ ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਿਦ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan mukat jagadees jap man dhaar rid parateet |
lines.english: Become Jivan-Mukta, liberated while yet alive, by meditating on the Lord of the Universe, O mind, and maintaining faith in Him in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਦਇਆ ਮਇਆ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਰਮਣੰ ਪਰਮ ਹੰਸਹ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jeea deaa meaa sarabatr ramanan param hansah reet |7|
lines.english: Show kindness and mercy to all beings, and realize that the Lord is pervading everywhere; this is the way of life of the enlightened soul, the supreme swan. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਤ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਰਸਨ ਨਾਮ ਉਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: det darasan sravan har jas rasan naam uchaar |
lines.english: He grants the Blessed Vision of His Darshan to those who listen to His Praises, and who, with their tongues, chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗ ਸੰਗ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਪਰਸਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰ ॥੮॥੧॥੨॥੫॥੧॥੧॥੨॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: ang sang bhagavaan parasan prabh naanak patit udhaar |8|1|2|5|1|1|2|57|
lines.english: They are part and parcel, life and limb with the Lord God; O Nanak, they feel the Touch of God, the Savior of sinners. ||8||1||2||5||1||1||2||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਸਿਕੰਦਰ ਬਿਰਾਹਿਮ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ਗਾਉਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree kee vaar mahalaa 3 sikandar biraahim kee vaar kee dhunee gaaunee |
lines.english: Goojaree Ki Vaar, Third Mehl, Sung In The Tune Of The Vaar Of Sikandar & Biraahim:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਤਾਂ ਜੀਵਣ ਪਦਵੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaanai jo chalai taan jeevan padavee paeh |
lines.english: One who walks in harmony with the Guru's Will, obtains the supreme status of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੁਆ ਜੀਵਣ ਕੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jagat mamataa muaa jeevan kee bidh naeh |
lines.english: This world perishing in attachment and possessiveness; no one knows the way of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree man vasai guramukh sehaj samaeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, the Lord abides in the minds of the Gurmukhs, who merge in celestial bliss. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਨ ਜੀਵਤੇ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe sadaa sadaa jan jeevate jo har charanee chit laeh |
lines.english: Those humble beings who focus their consciousness on the Lord's Feet, live forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਮਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: andar sahasaa dukh hai aapai sir dhandhai maar |
lines.english: Within the self is the pain of doubt; engrossed in worldly affairs, they are killing themselves.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਤੇ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਗਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਪਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae sute kabeh na jaageh maaeaa moh piaar |
lines.english: Asleep in the love of duality, they never wake up; they are in love with, and attached to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਵੀਚਾਰਹਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਾ ਆਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam na cheteh sabad na veechaareh ihu manamukh kaa aachaar |
lines.english: They do not think of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and they do not contemplate the Word of the Shabad. This is the conduct of the self-willed manmukhs.
